creator: jilles@FreeBSD.org
text:
In PR 169686, you wrote:
> [patch to make opie optional at build time]

You might try bringing up the subject of removing OPIE entirely on a
mailing list.

In addition to the unlinking of systat, there are other things in the
patch that do not belong in there, all in ftpd: a revert of
FreeBSD-SA-11:07.chroot, a SO_SNDBUF setting and a tightening of
checkuser().

-- 
Jilles Tjoelker
